stories.title: Sanders and Khanna introduce 5% wealth tax on billionaires
stories.description: The bill would tax America's 938 billionaires to fund $3,000 direct payments to most households and expand social programs.

stories.title: DOJ to drop defense of Trump orders targeting law firms
stories.description: The Justice Department plans to abandon appeals of rulings that struck down executive orders sanctioning four firms that refused White House deals.

stories.title: Qatar shoots down two Iranian jets in Gulf first
stories.description: The Gulf state also intercepted seven ballistic missiles and five drones on the third day of Iranian retaliatory strikes across the region.

stories.title: Hegseth refuses to rule out ground troops in Iran
stories.description: The defense secretary said there are no U.S. boots on the ground but declined to set limits, saying "we'll go as far as we need."

stories.title: Treasury ends Anthropic AI use as agencies comply with Trump ban
stories.description: Federal housing agencies also cut ties with the AI company, which refused to drop safety guardrails on surveillance and autonomous weapons for the Pentagon.

stories.title: Supreme Court hears case on gun ban for marijuana users
stories.description: The justices weighed whether the federal law barring "unlawful" drug users from possessing firearms violates the Second Amendment.

stories.title: Putin calls Gulf leaders as Iran conflict widens
stories.description: Russia says it is in "constant contact" with Tehran and Gulf states as U.S.-Israeli strikes on Iran enter a third day.

stories.title: Trump says Iran war likely to last at least a month
stories.description: Speaking at a White House Medal of Honor ceremony, the president delivered his first live remarks on the conflict as U.S. casualties rose to four.

stories.title: Macron offers to station French nuclear weapons in Europe
stories.description: France will expand its arsenal and extend "forward deterrence" to European allies, marking the biggest shift in French nuclear doctrine in decades.

stories.title: Claude AI hit by worldwide outage across all platforms
stories.description: Anthropic is investigating after its Claude chatbot went down globally, affecting web, mobile, and API users with errors and timeouts.

stories.title: Trump pushes Venezuela model for Iran transition
stories.description: The president told The New York Times he has "three very good choices" for Iran's next leader but declined to name them.

stories.title: Lebanon bans Hezbollah military operations after Israeli strikes kill dozens
stories.description: The emergency cabinet decision demands Hezbollah hand over its weapons after the group's rocket attacks on Israel triggered retaliatory airstrikes across Lebanon.

stories.title: Three US F-15s shot down by Kuwaiti air defenses in friendly fire incident
stories.description: All six crew members ejected safely and are in stable condition, CENTCOM said, as the Iran conflict enters its fourth day.

stories.title: Satellite images show smoke over Dubai as Iran's Gulf strikes enter third day
stories.description: Before-and-after imagery reveals fires at Jebel Ali port and Palm Jumeirah as Iranian drones and missiles continue hitting Gulf states.

stories.title: AWS outage spreads to Bahrain as Gulf strikes continue
stories.description: Amazon's cloud division reported disruptions at data centers in both the UAE and Bahrain on Monday amid ongoing Iranian retaliatory strikes across the Gulf.

stories.title: Iran fires missiles at Israel and US sites across Gulf in retaliation
stories.description: Hezbollah fired rockets into northern Israel for the first time since a 2024 ceasefire as Iran's retaliatory strikes killed at least nine in Beit Shemesh.

stories.title: Iran's top security chief rejects talks with US as strikes enter third day
stories.description: Ali Larijani said Tehran "will not negotiate" with Washington, rebuffing Trump's claim that Iran's post-Khamenei leadership wanted dialogue.

stories.title: FBI probes Austin shooting as terrorism amid Iran alert
stories.description: A gunman wearing an Iranian flag shirt killed two and wounded 14 at an Austin bar as the FBI investigates a possible terrorism link.

stories.title: Death toll at Iranian girls' school rises to 148
stories.description: The Minab elementary school strike is the deadliest single incident from the U.S.-Israeli military operation, according to Iranian state media.

stories.title: Democrats warn Iran strikes risk 'forever war' without a plan
stories.description: Top lawmakers say they saw no evidence of an imminent threat and demand Trump seek congressional authorization as Iran retaliates.

stories.title: Epstein files show DOJ examined accused men but charged none
stories.description: Newly released documents reveal victims cooperated with investigators after Epstein's 2019 death, but prosecutors cited insufficient evidence to bring cases.

stories.title: US calls Iran's claim it struck USS Lincoln a 'lie'
stories.description: The U.S. military said Iranian missiles "didn't even come close" to the aircraft carrier as the two nations trade strikes across the Middle East.

stories.title: Iran's foreign minister vows 'no limit' to self-defense after Khamenei killed
stories.description: Araghchi rejected Trump's warning against retaliation, saying Iran's military capability is intact and its forces are already striking back.

stories.title: Epstein files show doctors shared women's health records with him
stories.description: More than 15,000 newly released documents reveal how elite physicians bent ethical rules to serve the sex offender and the women he controlled.

stories.title: US confirms first combat use of drone reverse-engineered from Iran's Shahed
stories.description: The LUCAS kamikaze drone, built by copying a captured Iranian Shahed-136, was deployed in Operation Epic Fury strikes on Iranian military targets.

stories.title: CIA tracked Khamenei for months before Israel struck Tehran
stories.description: U.S. intelligence identified a rare gathering of Iran's top leaders, enabling the strike that killed the supreme leader and over 40 senior officials.

stories.title: OpenAI lands Pentagon deal and record $110B round
stories.description: The AI company secured the largest private funding round in history and a military contract with ethical guardrails, as rival Anthropic was shut out by the Trump administration.

stories.title: DOJ won't appeal ruling barring death penalty for Mangione
stories.description: Federal prosecutors said Friday they will not challenge a judge's decision removing the death penalty from Luigi Mangione's case, clearing the way for trial.

stories.title: UN Security Council holds emergency session on US-Israel strikes against Iran
stories.description: Iran retaliated with missile attacks across the region after the joint operation dubbed "Operation Epic Fury" targeted sites in multiple Iranian cities.

stories.title: Lawmakers clash over Trump's Iran strikes as Congress eyes war powers vote
stories.description: The killing of Iran's Supreme Leader Khamenei in "Operation Epic Fury" has split both parties over legality, strategy and next steps.

stories.title: Pentagon bars troops from Ivy League graduate programs
stories.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth ordered the cancellation of all military attendance at Princeton, Columbia, MIT, Brown, Yale, and other elite schools starting next academic year.

stories.title: Saudi, UAE leaders unite against Iran after missiles rock Gulf capitals
stories.description: Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman pledged "full solidarity" with UAE President Sheikh Mohammed bin Zayed after Iranian strikes killed one in Abu Dhabi.

stories.title: Melania Trump to chair UN Security Council amid US war on Iran
stories.description: The first lady's historic session promoting peace and education was planned before the US and Israel launched strikes on Iran days ago.

stories.title: Chile bars Chinese hospital ship from treating locals amid US tensions
stories.description: The decision came as Washington ramps up pressure on Santiago over a proposed Chinese undersea cable project.

stories.title: Houthis to resume Red Sea attacks after U.S.-Israeli strikes on Iran
stories.description: Two senior officials told the AP the group's first strike could come as soon as "tonight," ending a ceasefire with Washington.

stories.title: Businesses demand $175B in tariff refunds as Trump touts economy in Texas
stories.description: A coalition of 950 businesses pressed the president during his Corpus Christi visit, saying Texas small businesses alone are owed $11 billion in unlawful tariff costs.

stories.title: Ghana says 55 citizens killed fighting for Russia in Ukraine
stories.description: Foreign Minister Ablakwa said 272 Ghanaians were lured into the conflict since 2022 through criminal trafficking networks, with two held as POWs.

stories.title: Russia condemns US-Israeli strikes on Iran, evacuates citizens
stories.description: Moscow labeled the joint military operation "unprovoked armed aggression," warned of radiological catastrophe, and began evacuating Russians from Iran.

stories.title: Trump asks if Supreme Court can rehear tariff case
stories.description: The president called the 6-3 ruling "highly disappointing" and warned it could force refunds of hundreds of billions to foreign companies.

stories.title: FAA to cut O'Hare flights, citing overscheduling by major airlines
stories.description: United Airlines and American Airlines have dramatically ramped up summer schedules at the Chicago hub, prompting federal intervention.

stories.title: Slovak PM says Ukraine unwilling to restart Druzhba oil flow
stories.description: Slovakia's prime minister spoke with Zelenskyy on Friday but said Kyiv rejected a joint inspection proposal, deepening a dispute that has stalled EU sanctions and aid.

stories.title: Trump launched Iran strikes despite intel doubting his missile threat claims
stories.description: Intelligence sources told Reuters that Trump's claim Iran could "soon" hit the U.S. with missiles was unsupported by assessments putting that capability a decade away.

stories.title: Paramount signs $110B deal to acquire Warner Bros. Discovery
stories.description: The agreement ends a bidding war after Netflix declined to match Paramount Skydance's $31-per-share offer for the media giant.

stories.title: DOJ indicts 30 more over anti-ICE church protest in Minnesota
stories.description: Attorney General Bondi said 25 of the newly charged defendants have been arrested, bringing the total number indicted in the case to 39.

stories.title: Classified report found Noem's shoe policy created airport security risks
stories.description: A DHS inspector general report described risks from the policy as "significant," according to The Wall Street Journal, adding to scrutiny of Noem's leadership.

stories.title: Pentagon laser accidentally downs a Border Patrol drone in Texas
stories.description: The military mistakenly shot down a CBP drone near Fort Hancock, marking the second border laser incident this month and drawing Democratic accusations of incompetence.

stories.title: US birthrate hits record low, driven by teens and young women
stories.description: Nearly half of American women at age 30 are now childless, as the steepest fertility declines fall on the youngest and least affluent.

stories.title: Trump says he's considering Cruz for Supreme Court
stories.description: The president revived the idea at a Texas rally, despite Cruz rejecting it last month, saying "hell no" to any nomination.

stories.title: Satellite images reveal US military buildup at Saudi airbase
stories.description: Aircraft at Prince Sultan Airbase jumped from 27 to 43 over four days in February as the US ramps up its largest Middle East deployment in two decades.

stories.title: ACLU sues Kansas over law invalidating transgender IDs
stories.description: The lawsuit challenges SB 244, which retroactively voided driver's licenses and birth certificates of transgender residents who had legally updated their gender markers.

stories.title: Democrats say they have votes to subpoena Lutnick over Epstein ties
stories.description: Bipartisan support emerged Friday to compel Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick's testimony as scrutiny grows over a briefly deleted island photo.

stories.title: NASA overhauls Artemis moon program, adds test flight before lunar landing
stories.description: Administrator Isaacman said a new 2027 orbital mission will test commercial landers before attempting up to two moon landings in 2028.

stories.title: Bill Clinton tells Congress he 'did nothing wrong' in Epstein deposition
stories.description: The former president's closed-door testimony marks the first time a former president has been compelled to testify before Congress.

stories.title: Trump denies knowledge of draft emergency order on midterm elections
stories.description: The president said he had "never heard about" a proposal to declare a national emergency to reshape voting rules before November's midterms.

stories.title: Zelenskyy says he's ready to meet Putin for peace talks
stories.description: In a Sky News interview, the Ukrainian president said there is a closing window to end the war before U.S. midterm elections in November.

stories.title: Asian shares fall as Nvidia slump and Pakistan-Afghanistan war rattle markets
stories.description: Investors fled to safe havens Friday as tech valuations sagged post-Nvidia earnings and Pakistan declared "open war" on Afghanistan.

stories.title: Judge blocks early end of SAVE student loan plan
stories.description: A federal judge dismissed the Trump administration's bid to eliminate the SAVE repayment plan, keeping the program alive for over 7 million borrowers.

stories.title: Nintendo plans $1.9B share sale as banks unwind stakes
stories.description: MUFG Bank and the Bank of Kyoto are expected to sell their strategic holdings in the gaming giant, with a buyback also planned.

stories.title: Nvidia drops sharply despite record earnings as Block cuts half its staff
stories.description: Wall Street sold off Thursday as Nvidia's blowout quarter failed to satisfy investors, while Block announced 4,000 layoffs tied to AI.

stories.title: Court lets Trump end union bargaining for federal workers
stories.description: The Ninth Circuit vacated an injunction blocking the president's executive order, which strips collective bargaining rights from hundreds of thousands of employees.

stories.title: Green Party wins first-ever UK by-election, pushing Labour to third
stories.description: Hannah Spencer captured the Gorton and Denton seat in Greater Manchester, overturning a Labour majority in a district the party held for nearly a century.

stories.title: Germany votes to let military intercept drones
stories.description: The Bundestag passed a law allowing the Bundeswehr to jam or shoot down drones, responding to a surge in suspicious flights linked to Russia.

stories.title: Trump tells homebuyers to 'wait a little longer' for lower mortgage rates
stories.description: The president urged patience on housing costs as rates hit a three-year low but sales slumped to their weakest pace in over two years.

stories.title: Venezuela suspends 19 Maduro-era oil contracts
stories.description: Caracas and Washington are reviewing the deals and may revoke some, as both governments scrutinize the credentials of little-known firms involved.

stories.title: White House confirms American killed in Cuba speedboat shootout
stories.description: At least one U.S. citizen died and another was arrested after Cuban forces fired on a stolen Florida boat whose occupants allegedly shot first.

stories.title: Senate Democrats demand tariff refunds, accuse Bessent of 'stonewalling'
stories.description: More than two dozen senators urged the Treasury to begin repaying billions in duties the Supreme Court struck down last week.

stories.title: Maduro asks judge to toss drug indictment over blocked legal fees
stories.description: His lawyer argues the U.S. violated Maduro's right to counsel by blocking Venezuela from paying his defense costs.

stories.title: Syria, Druze factions complete first prisoner swap since summer clashes
stories.description: The exchange of 86 detainees in Sweida marks a rare step toward political resolution in one of Syria's last autonomous regions.

stories.title: Trump floats 'friendly takeover of Cuba' amid oil blockade
stories.description: The president said Cuba is "in a big deal of trouble" and that Secretary of State Rubio is negotiating at a "very high level."

stories.title: 171 bodies found in mass graves near Congo's Uvira after M23 withdrawal
stories.description: Officials say two graves were discovered in areas the Rwanda-backed rebel group recently vacated amid escalating violence in eastern Congo.

stories.title: Russia says it downed 220 Ukrainian drones over nine hours
stories.description: The interceptions over nine hours included 27 drones heading for Moscow, according to Russian officials, amid escalating aerial exchanges on both sides.

stories.title: Meloni calls Trump tariffs a 'mistake,' proposes EU-US free-trade zone
stories.description: Italy's prime minister urged the EU to push for zero tariffs with Washington as the Turnberry trade deal remains frozen after a Supreme Court ruling.

stories.title: ICE struggles to vet recruits amid hiring surge, internal email shows
stories.description: An internal email warned supervisors that delayed background checks are creating confusion as some recruits were flagged for gang ties and active warrants.

stories.title: UN denounces Taliban decree expanding executions and curbing rights
stories.description: Volker Türk condemned a new Taliban decree expanding the death penalty and legalizing corporal punishment, likening women's treatment to gender apartheid.

stories.title: GOP senators join Democrats demanding DOJ release Epstein files tied to Trump
stories.description: Bipartisan pressure mounted Thursday after an NPR investigation found FBI interview summaries involving accusations against the president were missing from the public release.

stories.title: US offers $10M reward for tips leading to capture of Sinaloa Cartel leaders
stories.description: The State Department announced bounties for René and Alfonso Arzate-García as a superseding indictment charges them with narcoterrorism.

stories.title: Google rolls out Nano Banana 2 as default AI image model across Gemini
stories.description: The upgrade brings Pro-level image generation to all users at faster speeds, spanning the Gemini app, Google Search, and 141 countries.

stories.title: NYC mayor pitches Trump on $21B housing plan in Queens
stories.description: Mamdani presented a mock Daily News front page reading "Trump to City: Let's Build" to sell the proposal, and Trump was "very enthusiastic," his office said.

stories.title: Hillary Clinton's Epstein deposition paused after Boebert leaks photo
stories.description: Rep. Lauren Boebert allegedly gave an unauthorized photo from the closed-door hearing to commentator Benny Johnson, who posted it online.

stories.title: US saw net negative migration in 2025, a first since the Great Depression
stories.description: A Wall Street Journal investigation found at least 180,000 Americans relocated abroad last year as the nation lost more people than it gained.

stories.title: US and Congo sign $1.2B health deal amid African data-sharing concerns
stories.description: The DRC became the 19th country to sign a bilateral health agreement under Trump's "America First Global Health Strategy," even as the Africa CDC raised alarm over data provisions.

stories.title: Stellantis cuts UAW profit-sharing for first time in 15 years after record loss
stories.description: The automaker reported a net loss of roughly $26.3 billion for 2025, driven by massive EV writedowns and a sweeping strategic reset.

stories.title: US, Ukraine meet in Geneva after Russia's massive overnight aerial barrage
stories.description: Talks focused on a postwar "prosperity package" and preparations for trilateral negotiations with Russia expected in early March.

stories.title: FBI's congressional affairs chief departs amid ongoing bureau turmoil
stories.description: Marshall Yates, a key liaison between the FBI and Congress who helped carry out the Trump administration's retribution efforts, is leaving this week.

stories.title: Rutgers study challenges theory that melting glaciers could slow climate change
stories.description: Meltwater from an Antarctic ice shelf delivers far less iron to the ocean than assumed, undermining a key natural climate feedback mechanism.

stories.title: US rare earth shortages deepen as suppliers halt production
stories.description: Two North American aerospace coating firms have suspended operations and begun rationing yttrium amid a 69-fold price surge over the past year.

stories.title: Columbia student detained by ICE freed after NYC mayor raised case with Trump
stories.description: Ellie Aghayeva, a senior from Azerbaijan, was arrested from a campus building after agents allegedly posed as missing-person investigators.

stories.title: UN issues first carbon credits under Paris Agreement
stories.description: The milestone approval involves a clean-cooking project in Myanmar, though environmental groups have questioned the methodology behind the credits.

stories.title: Space Force halts Vulcan rocket launches over booster anomaly
stories.description: The suspension could last "many months," jeopardizing a GPS satellite launch next month and ULA's plans to fly up to 22 Vulcan missions this year.

stories.title: White House says Trump open to Kim talks 'without preconditions'
stories.description: The response came hours after Kim Jong Un signaled willingness to engage at the close of North Korea's most significant political congress in five years.

stories.title: DARPA awards RTX contract for kilometer-range X-ray vision
stories.description: The XENA program aims to let military commanders identify concealed threats from nearly a kilometer away, far beyond current X-ray scanner range.

stories.title: Nearly blind refugee found dead in Buffalo after Border Patrol left him
stories.description: Nurul Amin Shah Alam, 56, went missing for six days after agents dropped him off without contacting his family or lawyer. Buffalo's mayor called the death "preventable."

stories.title: Trump surgeon general pick lacks GOP votes after vaccine grilling
stories.description: At least two Republican senators remain undecided on Casey Means after she sidestepped vaccine questions at her confirmation hearing.

stories.title: NASA's Fincke says he was behind historic ISS medical evacuation
stories.description: The veteran astronaut broke weeks of silence, revealing he experienced a "medical event" on Jan. 7 that cut the Crew-11 mission short.

stories.title: Canada sends $8M in food aid to Cuba amid US fuel blockade
stories.description: Mexico also dispatched a second shipment of humanitarian supplies as the island faces what the UN has warned could be a humanitarian collapse.

stories.title: US aims to process 4,500 white South African refugees per month
stories.description: A contracting document reveals the White House's monthly target far exceeds Trump's annual refugee cap of 7,500 for all nationalities.

stories.title: Larry Summers to resign from Harvard over Epstein ties
stories.description: The former Harvard president and Treasury secretary will give up his University Professorship, the school's highest faculty distinction, at the end of the academic year.

stories.title: Largest-ever ALMA image reveals Milky Way's hidden core
stories.description: The mosaic spans more than 650 light-years, mapping cold star-forming gases and dozens of molecules near the galaxy's central black hole.

stories.title: Trump admin defers $259M in Medicaid funds from Minnesota
stories.description: Vice President Vance and CMS Administrator Dr. Oz announced the action as part of a new "war on fraud" declared during Trump's State of the Union.

stories.title: Bipartisan lawmakers press Navy to finalize 15-submarine deal
stories.description: Congress warns that further delays to the multiyear contract for Virginia-class and Columbia-class boats could destabilize the nuclear submarine industrial base.

stories.title: Environmental groups sound alarm after Colorado River talks miss another deadline
stories.description: Seven western states failed to agree on sharing the river's dwindling supply before current rules expire, as historic snow drought drains reservoirs.

stories.title: Labor Dept. proposes rule easing gig worker classification
stories.description: The proposal would rescind a Biden-era standard and make it easier for companies to treat workers as independent contractors.

stories.title: Study finds 40,000-year-old carvings approach complexity of earliest writing
stories.description: Computational analysis of Ice Age symbols on tools and figurines found their information density rivals proto-cuneiform, which emerged 37,000 years later.

stories.title: Study links Saturn's rings to ancient crash that formed Titan
stories.description: Researchers say a collision between two moons about 400 million years ago may explain Saturn's rings, Titan's formation, and other long-standing mysteries.

stories.title: Patel fires FBI staff tied to Trump probe, says phone records seized
stories.description: The FBI director ordered the ouster of at least 10 employees and revealed the bureau had subpoenaed his and Susie Wiles' call records during the Biden era.

stories.title: HSBC's 2025 profit beats estimates despite $5B in charges
stories.description: Europe's largest bank posted $29.9 billion in pretax profit, topping analyst expectations on strength in wealth management and transaction banking.

stories.title: Bill Gates apologizes to foundation staff over Epstein ties
stories.description: Gates called his association with the convicted sex offender "a huge mistake" and acknowledged bringing foundation executives into meetings with Epstein.

stories.title: Treasury official exits over Minnesota fraud crackdown
stories.description: John Hurley, a Trump donor and decorated veteran, objected to White House plans targeting financial transactions in Minnesota's Somali community.

stories.title: Rep. Gonzales says he won't resign over alleged affair with staffer who died
stories.description: Five House Republicans have called for Gonzales to step down, but GOP leadership has urged patience as investigations continue.

stories.title: Mexico probes cartel-linked accounts spreading fake news after El Mencho killing
stories.description: Researchers say the Jalisco New Generation Cartel ran a coordinated propaganda campaign using AI-generated images to amplify fear after its leader's death.

stories.title: Judge strikes down Trump third-country deportation policy
stories.description: U.S. District Judge Brian Murphy ruled the policy of deporting migrants to countries other than their own without notice violates due process.

stories.title: Senate Democrats block DHS funding bill hours before State of the Union
stories.description: The vote fell short of the 60 needed to overcome a filibuster, extending the partial shutdown into its 11th day with no deal in sight.

stories.title: Whistleblower alleges Patel's FBI jet use delayed shooting responses
stories.description: Whistleblowers allege Kash Patel's personal flights delayed FBI responses to the Brown University shooting and the Charlie Kirk assassination.

stories.title: Trump says Omar and Tlaib should be 'sent back' after State of the Union clash
stories.description: The president called the two Muslim American lawmakers "lunatics" on Truth Social a day after they heckled him during his address to Congress.

stories.title: Russia accuses UK and France of plotting to arm Ukraine with nukes
stories.description: Medvedev threatened nuclear strikes against Ukraine, Britain, and France after Russia's intelligence service made the unsubstantiated claim on the war's fourth anniversary.

stories.title: US warned Ukraine over strikes that hit American oil interests
stories.description: Ukraine's envoy says the State Department issued a formal complaint after drone attacks on a Russian port disrupted a pipeline carrying Kazakh crude tied to Chevron and ExxonMobil.

stories.title: Omar's State of the Union guest arrested for standing during Trump's speech
stories.description: Aliya Rahman, a disabled Minneapolis woman previously dragged from her car by ICE agents, says Capitol Police arrested her for silently standing.

stories.title: DOJ sues University of California over alleged antisemitism at UCLA
stories.description: The lawsuit escalates a year-long battle after the university refused to accept a settlement exceeding $1 billion.

stories.title: Fed officials warn AI could reshape jobs, rates
stories.description: Three Federal Reserve leaders addressed AI's economic risks over the past week, from mass unemployment scenarios to the central bank's own cautious adoption.

stories.title: White House invokes executive privilege to block Gabbard whistleblower intelligence
stories.description: The Trump administration told Congress it will not release classified material behind a complaint alleging Gabbard restricted an NSA intercept mentioning Jared Kushner.

stories.title: US and NATO launch major Arctic exercises amid rising tensions
stories.description: NORAD and U.S. Northern Command began Arctic Edge 2026 on Feb. 23, a three-week drill across Alaska and Greenland as NATO consolidates Arctic operations.

stories.title: Russia opens criminal case against Telegram's Durov
stories.description: The FSB accuses the Telegram founder of facilitating terrorist activities, a charge carrying up to life in prison.

stories.title: China says it met Phase One trade deal terms, warns US against new tariffs
stories.description: Beijing's Commerce Ministry urged Washington not to "shift blame" weeks before Trump's planned visit to China in late March.

stories.title: House falls one vote short on DC crash safety bill
stories.description: The ROTOR Act, which passed the Senate unanimously, failed after the Pentagon reversed its support over national security concerns.

stories.title: Supreme Court shields USPS from suits over withheld mail
stories.description: A 5-4 ruling found federal law protects the Postal Service from lawsuits even when employees deliberately refuse to deliver mail.

stories.title: Trump skips Artemis II mention despite crew attending State of the Union
stories.description: The four astronauts set to fly around the moon sat in the Capitol gallery as guests of Speaker Johnson, but NASA's program went unmentioned.

stories.title: Oklahoma lawmakers weigh data center moratorium as water demands soar
stories.description: Google alone used over 1.1 billion gallons at one facility in a year, fueling calls for a construction freeze through 2029.

stories.title: Savannah Guthrie offers $1M reward for missing mother
stories.description: The "Today" show host's family reward brings the total to $1.2 million, 24 days after Nancy Guthrie was taken from her Arizona home.

stories.title: Gov. Spanberger targets costs, 'chaos' in Democratic State of the Union rebuttal
stories.description: Virginia's governor spoke from Colonial Williamsburg, framing Democrats as the party of affordability as over 50 members boycotted Trump's address.

stories.title: US details alleged secret Chinese nuclear test, urges disarmament talks
stories.description: Washington presented declassified seismic evidence of a 2020 underground test at China's Lop Nur site. Beijing called the accusation "completely unfounded."

stories.title: Cook, Huang, Su got secret CIA briefing on China-Taiwan threat
stories.description: A New York Times investigation reveals that top tech CEOs received classified intelligence warnings about a potential Chinese move on Taiwan by 2027.

stories.title: Trump delivers record-breaking State of the Union at 1 hour, 48 minutes
stories.description: The president declared a "golden age of America," honored the U.S. Olympic hockey team, and laid out his second-year agenda amid Democratic boycotts.

stories.title: Russia losing troops faster than it can replace them, Western officials say
stories.description: As the war in Ukraine marks its fourth anniversary, Western officials say Moscow's battlefield losses have outpaced recruitment for three straight months.

stories.title: Meta signs 6-gigawatt AI chip deal with AMD
stories.description: AMD issued Meta a warrant for up to 160 million shares, with vesting tied to shipment milestones across a multi-year GPU deployment.

stories.title: Trump unveils Big Tech data center energy pledges at State of the Union
stories.description: Tech companies agreed to cover electricity costs from new AI data centers so residential bills don't rise, though critics say the voluntary pledges lack teeth.

stories.title: Russia warns US nuclear testing would trigger 'domino effect'
stories.description: Moscow responded to Washington's escalating accusations against China and signals it may resume nuclear testing for the first time since 1992.

stories.title: Iran nears deal to buy supersonic missiles from China
stories.description: Reuters reports Iran is close to purchasing CM-302 anti-ship cruise missiles from China as the U.S. masses naval forces near Iranian waters.

stories.title: Trump touts drug price deals at State of the Union
stories.description: The president called on Congress to pass his "Great Healthcare Plan" but did not address the ACA subsidy lapse affecting 22 million people.

stories.title: Asian markets split as AI fears, new tariffs rattle investors
stories.description: Chipmakers rallied in Japan and South Korea while Hong Kong fell, following a Wall Street selloff led by IBM's worst day in 25 years.

stories.title: MIT study rules out wildfires, volcanoes as cause of recent surface warming
stories.description: Researchers isolated temperature effects of three major natural events and found none explain the acceleration of global warming at Earth's surface.

stories.title: Trump touts economic revival in State of the Union amid record-low approval
stories.description: The president declared a "turnaround for the ages" while polls show just 36% of Americans approve of his job performance heading into midterm season.

stories.title: Explosion near Moscow train station kills police officer on Ukraine war anniversary
stories.description: An unidentified attacker detonated a device beside a patrol car at Savyolovsky Station, killing himself and an officer and wounding two others.

stories.title: 2026 is deadliest start to a year for Mediterranean migrants, UN says
stories.description: At least 606 migrants have died or gone missing crossing the Mediterranean since January, the IOM said, as rescuers search for 30 people off Crete.

stories.title: Trump calls for new tax cuts in State of the Union address
stories.description: The president pushed for additional individual and corporate tax relief while touting last year's fiscal overhaul and calling the Supreme Court's tariff ruling "unfortunate."

stories.title: Ukraine reconstruction costs hit $588B as war marks four years
stories.description: A new World Bank assessment found direct damage rose 11% in the past year, with energy infrastructure destruction surging 21%.

stories.title: Maryland sues to block ICE detention center near Williamsport
stories.description: Attorney General Anthony Brown alleges DHS spent $102.4 million on a warehouse without required environmental review or public input.

stories.title: Trump uses State of the Union to push voter ID bill
stories.description: The president urged Senate Republicans to overcome a Democratic filibuster and pass the SAVE America Act ahead of the 2026 midterms.

stories.title: Anthropic says Chinese AI labs used 24,000 fake accounts to copy Claude
stories.description: The company alleges DeepSeek, Moonshot AI, and MiniMax prompted its chatbot over 16 million times to extract advanced capabilities for their own models.

stories.title: Nick Reiner pleads not guilty to murdering parents Rob and Michele Reiner
stories.description: The 32-year-old faces the death penalty or life without parole for the December stabbing deaths at the family's Brentwood home.

stories.title: Trump unveils retirement plan with federal match for uninsured workers
stories.description: Over 40 million private-sector workers without employer plans would gain access to federal-style retirement accounts with up to $1,000 in annual matching.

stories.title: Sanders and Khanna introduce 5% wealth tax on billionaires
stories.description: The bill would tax America's 938 billionaires to fund $3,000 direct payments to most households and expand social programs.

stories.title: DOJ to drop defense of Trump orders targeting law firms
stories.description: The Justice Department plans to abandon appeals of rulings that struck down executive orders sanctioning four firms that refused White House deals.

stories.title: Qatar shoots down two Iranian jets in Gulf first
stories.description: The Gulf state also intercepted seven ballistic missiles and five drones on the third day of Iranian retaliatory strikes across the region.

stories.title: Hegseth refuses to rule out ground troops in Iran
stories.description: The defense secretary said there are no U.S. boots on the ground but declined to set limits, saying "we'll go as far as we need."

stories.title: Treasury ends Anthropic AI use as agencies comply with Trump ban
stories.description: Federal housing agencies also cut ties with the AI company, which refused to drop safety guardrails on surveillance and autonomous weapons for the Pentagon.

stories.title: Supreme Court hears case on gun ban for marijuana users
stories.description: The justices weighed whether the federal law barring "unlawful" drug users from possessing firearms violates the Second Amendment.

stories.title: Putin calls Gulf leaders as Iran conflict widens
stories.description: Russia says it is in "constant contact" with Tehran and Gulf states as U.S.-Israeli strikes on Iran enter a third day.

stories.title: Trump says Iran war likely to last at least a month
stories.description: Speaking at a White House Medal of Honor ceremony, the president delivered his first live remarks on the conflict as U.S. casualties rose to four.

stories.title: Macron offers to station French nuclear weapons in Europe
stories.description: France will expand its arsenal and extend "forward deterrence" to European allies, marking the biggest shift in French nuclear doctrine in decades.

stories.title: Claude AI hit by worldwide outage across all platforms
stories.description: Anthropic is investigating after its Claude chatbot went down globally, affecting web, mobile, and API users with errors and timeouts.

stories.title: Trump pushes Venezuela model for Iran transition
stories.description: The president told The New York Times he has "three very good choices" for Iran's next leader but declined to name them.

stories.title: Lebanon bans Hezbollah military operations after Israeli strikes kill dozens
stories.description: The emergency cabinet decision demands Hezbollah hand over its weapons after the group's rocket attacks on Israel triggered retaliatory airstrikes across Lebanon.

stories.title: Three US F-15s shot down by Kuwaiti air defenses in friendly fire incident
stories.description: All six crew members ejected safely and are in stable condition, CENTCOM said, as the Iran conflict enters its fourth day.

stories.title: Satellite images show smoke over Dubai as Iran's Gulf strikes enter third day
stories.description: Before-and-after imagery reveals fires at Jebel Ali port and Palm Jumeirah as Iranian drones and missiles continue hitting Gulf states.

stories.title: AWS outage spreads to Bahrain as Gulf strikes continue
stories.description: Amazon's cloud division reported disruptions at data centers in both the UAE and Bahrain on Monday amid ongoing Iranian retaliatory strikes across the Gulf.

stories.title: Iran fires missiles at Israel and US sites across Gulf in retaliation
stories.description: Hezbollah fired rockets into northern Israel for the first time since a 2024 ceasefire as Iran's retaliatory strikes killed at least nine in Beit Shemesh.

stories.title: Iran's top security chief rejects talks with US as strikes enter third day
stories.description: Ali Larijani said Tehran "will not negotiate" with Washington, rebuffing Trump's claim that Iran's post-Khamenei leadership wanted dialogue.

stories.title: FBI probes Austin shooting as terrorism amid Iran alert
stories.description: A gunman wearing an Iranian flag shirt killed two and wounded 14 at an Austin bar as the FBI investigates a possible terrorism link.

stories.title: Death toll at Iranian girls' school rises to 148
stories.description: The Minab elementary school strike is the deadliest single incident from the U.S.-Israeli military operation, according to Iranian state media.

stories.title: Democrats warn Iran strikes risk 'forever war' without a plan
stories.description: Top lawmakers say they saw no evidence of an imminent threat and demand Trump seek congressional authorization as Iran retaliates.

stories.title: Epstein files show DOJ examined accused men but charged none
stories.description: Newly released documents reveal victims cooperated with investigators after Epstein's 2019 death, but prosecutors cited insufficient evidence to bring cases.

stories.title: US calls Iran's claim it struck USS Lincoln a 'lie'
stories.description: The U.S. military said Iranian missiles "didn't even come close" to the aircraft carrier as the two nations trade strikes across the Middle East.

stories.title: Iran's foreign minister vows 'no limit' to self-defense after Khamenei killed
stories.description: Araghchi rejected Trump's warning against retaliation, saying Iran's military capability is intact and its forces are already striking back.

stories.title: Epstein files show doctors shared women's health records with him
stories.description: More than 15,000 newly released documents reveal how elite physicians bent ethical rules to serve the sex offender and the women he controlled.

stories.title: US confirms first combat use of drone reverse-engineered from Iran's Shahed
stories.description: The LUCAS kamikaze drone, built by copying a captured Iranian Shahed-136, was deployed in Operation Epic Fury strikes on Iranian military targets.

stories.title: CIA tracked Khamenei for months before Israel struck Tehran
stories.description: U.S. intelligence identified a rare gathering of Iran's top leaders, enabling the strike that killed the supreme leader and over 40 senior officials.

stories.title: OpenAI lands Pentagon deal and record $110B round
stories.description: The AI company secured the largest private funding round in history and a military contract with ethical guardrails, as rival Anthropic was shut out by the Trump administration.

stories.title: DOJ won't appeal ruling barring death penalty for Mangione
stories.description: Federal prosecutors said Friday they will not challenge a judge's decision removing the death penalty from Luigi Mangione's case, clearing the way for trial.

stories.title: UN Security Council holds emergency session on US-Israel strikes against Iran
stories.description: Iran retaliated with missile attacks across the region after the joint operation dubbed "Operation Epic Fury" targeted sites in multiple Iranian cities.

stories.title: Lawmakers clash over Trump's Iran strikes as Congress eyes war powers vote
stories.description: The killing of Iran's Supreme Leader Khamenei in "Operation Epic Fury" has split both parties over legality, strategy and next steps.

stories.title: Pentagon bars troops from Ivy League graduate programs
stories.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth ordered the cancellation of all military attendance at Princeton, Columbia, MIT, Brown, Yale, and other elite schools starting next academic year.

stories.title: Saudi, UAE leaders unite against Iran after missiles rock Gulf capitals
stories.description: Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman pledged "full solidarity" with UAE President Sheikh Mohammed bin Zayed after Iranian strikes killed one in Abu Dhabi.

stories.title: Melania Trump to chair UN Security Council amid US war on Iran
stories.description: The first lady's historic session promoting peace and education was planned before the US and Israel launched strikes on Iran days ago.

stories.title: Chile bars Chinese hospital ship from treating locals amid US tensions
stories.description: The decision came as Washington ramps up pressure on Santiago over a proposed Chinese undersea cable project.

stories.title: Houthis to resume Red Sea attacks after U.S.-Israeli strikes on Iran
stories.description: Two senior officials told the AP the group's first strike could come as soon as "tonight," ending a ceasefire with Washington.

stories.title: Businesses demand $175B in tariff refunds as Trump touts economy in Texas
stories.description: A coalition of 950 businesses pressed the president during his Corpus Christi visit, saying Texas small businesses alone are owed $11 billion in unlawful tariff costs.

stories.title: Ghana says 55 citizens killed fighting for Russia in Ukraine
stories.description: Foreign Minister Ablakwa said 272 Ghanaians were lured into the conflict since 2022 through criminal trafficking networks, with two held as POWs.

stories.title: Russia condemns US-Israeli strikes on Iran, evacuates citizens
stories.description: Moscow labeled the joint military operation "unprovoked armed aggression," warned of radiological catastrophe, and began evacuating Russians from Iran.

stories.title: Trump asks if Supreme Court can rehear tariff case
stories.description: The president called the 6-3 ruling "highly disappointing" and warned it could force refunds of hundreds of billions to foreign companies.

stories.title: FAA to cut O'Hare flights, citing overscheduling by major airlines
stories.description: United Airlines and American Airlines have dramatically ramped up summer schedules at the Chicago hub, prompting federal intervention.

stories.title: Slovak PM says Ukraine unwilling to restart Druzhba oil flow
stories.description: Slovakia's prime minister spoke with Zelenskyy on Friday but said Kyiv rejected a joint inspection proposal, deepening a dispute that has stalled EU sanctions and aid.

stories.title: Trump launched Iran strikes despite intel doubting his missile threat claims
stories.description: Intelligence sources told Reuters that Trump's claim Iran could "soon" hit the U.S. with missiles was unsupported by assessments putting that capability a decade away.

stories.title: Paramount signs $110B deal to acquire Warner Bros. Discovery
stories.description: The agreement ends a bidding war after Netflix declined to match Paramount Skydance's $31-per-share offer for the media giant.

stories.title: DOJ indicts 30 more over anti-ICE church protest in Minnesota
stories.description: Attorney General Bondi said 25 of the newly charged defendants have been arrested, bringing the total number indicted in the case to 39.

stories.title: Classified report found Noem's shoe policy created airport security risks
stories.description: A DHS inspector general report described risks from the policy as "significant," according to The Wall Street Journal, adding to scrutiny of Noem's leadership.

stories.title: Pentagon laser accidentally downs a Border Patrol drone in Texas
stories.description: The military mistakenly shot down a CBP drone near Fort Hancock, marking the second border laser incident this month and drawing Democratic accusations of incompetence.

stories.title: US birthrate hits record low, driven by teens and young women
stories.description: Nearly half of American women at age 30 are now childless, as the steepest fertility declines fall on the youngest and least affluent.

stories.title: Trump says he's considering Cruz for Supreme Court
stories.description: The president revived the idea at a Texas rally, despite Cruz rejecting it last month, saying "hell no" to any nomination.

stories.title: Satellite images reveal US military buildup at Saudi airbase
stories.description: Aircraft at Prince Sultan Airbase jumped from 27 to 43 over four days in February as the US ramps up its largest Middle East deployment in two decades.

stories.title: ACLU sues Kansas over law invalidating transgender IDs
stories.description: The lawsuit challenges SB 244, which retroactively voided driver's licenses and birth certificates of transgender residents who had legally updated their gender markers.

stories.description: The bill would tax America's 938 billionaires to fund $3,000 direct payments to most households and expand social programs.

finance.description: The defense secretary said there are no U.S. boots on the ground but declined to set limits, saying "we'll go as far as we need."

finance.title: Treasury ends Anthropic AI use as agencies comply with Trump ban
finance.description: Federal housing agencies also cut ties with the AI company, which refused to drop safety guardrails on surveillance and autonomous weapons for the Pentagon.

finance.title: Supreme Court hears case on gun ban for marijuana users
finance.description: The justices weighed whether the federal law barring "unlawful" drug users from possessing firearms violates the Second Amendment.

finance.title: Putin calls Gulf leaders as Iran conflict widens
finance.description: Russia says it is in "constant contact" with Tehran and Gulf states as U.S.-Israeli strikes on Iran enter a third day.

finance.title: Trump says Iran war likely to last at least a month
finance.description: Speaking at a White House Medal of Honor ceremony, the president delivered his first live remarks on the conflict as U.S. casualties rose to four.

finance.title: Macron offers to station French nuclear weapons in Europe
finance.description: France will expand its arsenal and extend "forward deterrence" to European allies, marking the biggest shift in French nuclear doctrine in decades.

finance.title: Claude AI hit by worldwide outage across all platforms
finance.description: Anthropic is investigating after its Claude chatbot went down globally, affecting web, mobile, and API users with errors and timeouts.

finance.title: Trump pushes Venezuela model for Iran transition
finance.description: The president told The New York Times he has "three very good choices" for Iran's next leader but declined to name them.

finance.title: Lebanon bans Hezbollah military operations after Israeli strikes kill dozens
finance.description: The emergency cabinet decision demands Hezbollah hand over its weapons after the group's rocket attacks on Israel triggered retaliatory airstrikes across Lebanon.

finance.title: Three US F-15s shot down by Kuwaiti air defenses in friendly fire incident
finance.description: All six crew members ejected safely and are in stable condition, CENTCOM said, as the Iran conflict enters its fourth day.

finance.title: Satellite images show smoke over Dubai as Iran's Gulf strikes enter third day
finance.description: Before-and-after imagery reveals fires at Jebel Ali port and Palm Jumeirah as Iranian drones and missiles continue hitting Gulf states.

finance.title: AWS outage spreads to Bahrain as Gulf strikes continue
finance.description: Amazon's cloud division reported disruptions at data centers in both the UAE and Bahrain on Monday amid ongoing Iranian retaliatory strikes across the Gulf.

finance.title: Iran fires missiles at Israel and US sites across Gulf in retaliation
finance.description: Hezbollah fired rockets into northern Israel for the first time since a 2024 ceasefire as Iran's retaliatory strikes killed at least nine in Beit Shemesh.

finance.title: Iran's top security chief rejects talks with US as strikes enter third day
finance.description: Ali Larijani said Tehran "will not negotiate" with Washington, rebuffing Trump's claim that Iran's post-Khamenei leadership wanted dialogue.

finance.title: FBI probes Austin shooting as terrorism amid Iran alert
finance.description: A gunman wearing an Iranian flag shirt killed two and wounded 14 at an Austin bar as the FBI investigates a possible terrorism link.

finance.title: Death toll at Iranian girls' school rises to 148
finance.description: The Minab elementary school strike is the deadliest single incident from the U.S.-Israeli military operation, according to Iranian state media.

finance.title: Democrats warn Iran strikes risk 'forever war' without a plan
finance.description: Top lawmakers say they saw no evidence of an imminent threat and demand Trump seek congressional authorization as Iran retaliates.

finance.title: Epstein files show DOJ examined accused men but charged none
finance.description: Newly released documents reveal victims cooperated with investigators after Epstein's 2019 death, but prosecutors cited insufficient evidence to bring cases.

finance.title: US calls Iran's claim it struck USS Lincoln a 'lie'
finance.description: The U.S. military said Iranian missiles "didn't even come close" to the aircraft carrier as the two nations trade strikes across the Middle East.

finance.title: Iran's foreign minister vows 'no limit' to self-defense after Khamenei killed
finance.description: Araghchi rejected Trump's warning against retaliation, saying Iran's military capability is intact and its forces are already striking back.

finance.title: Epstein files show doctors shared women's health records with him
finance.description: More than 15,000 newly released documents reveal how elite physicians bent ethical rules to serve the sex offender and the women he controlled.

finance.title: US confirms first combat use of drone reverse-engineered from Iran's Shahed
finance.description: The LUCAS kamikaze drone, built by copying a captured Iranian Shahed-136, was deployed in Operation Epic Fury strikes on Iranian military targets.

finance.title: CIA tracked Khamenei for months before Israel struck Tehran
finance.description: U.S. intelligence identified a rare gathering of Iran's top leaders, enabling the strike that killed the supreme leader and over 40 senior officials.

finance.title: OpenAI lands Pentagon deal and record $110B round
finance.description: The AI company secured the largest private funding round in history and a military contract with ethical guardrails, as rival Anthropic was shut out by the Trump administration.

finance.title: DOJ won't appeal ruling barring death penalty for Mangione
finance.description: Federal prosecutors said Friday they will not challenge a judge's decision removing the death penalty from Luigi Mangione's case, clearing the way for trial.

finance.title: UN Security Council holds emergency session on US-Israel strikes against Iran
finance.description: Iran retaliated with missile attacks across the region after the joint operation dubbed "Operation Epic Fury" targeted sites in multiple Iranian cities.

finance.title: Lawmakers clash over Trump's Iran strikes as Congress eyes war powers vote
finance.description: The killing of Iran's Supreme Leader Khamenei in "Operation Epic Fury" has split both parties over legality, strategy and next steps.

finance.title: Pentagon bars troops from Ivy League graduate programs
finance.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth ordered the cancellation of all military attendance at Princeton, Columbia, MIT, Brown, Yale, and other elite schools starting next academic year.

finance.title: Saudi, UAE leaders unite against Iran after missiles rock Gulf capitals
finance.description: Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman pledged "full solidarity" with UAE President Sheikh Mohammed bin Zayed after Iranian strikes killed one in Abu Dhabi.

finance.title: Melania Trump to chair UN Security Council amid US war on Iran
finance.description: The first lady's historic session promoting peace and education was planned before the US and Israel launched strikes on Iran days ago.

finance.title: Chile bars Chinese hospital ship from treating locals amid US tensions
finance.description: The decision came as Washington ramps up pressure on Santiago over a proposed Chinese undersea cable project.

finance.title: Houthis to resume Red Sea attacks after U.S.-Israeli strikes on Iran
finance.description: Two senior officials told the AP the group's first strike could come as soon as "tonight," ending a ceasefire with Washington.

finance.title: Businesses demand $175B in tariff refunds as Trump touts economy in Texas
finance.description: A coalition of 950 businesses pressed the president during his Corpus Christi visit, saying Texas small businesses alone are owed $11 billion in unlawful tariff costs.

finance.title: Ghana says 55 citizens killed fighting for Russia in Ukraine
finance.description: Foreign Minister Ablakwa said 272 Ghanaians were lured into the conflict since 2022 through criminal trafficking networks, with two held as POWs.

finance.title: Russia condemns US-Israeli strikes on Iran, evacuates citizens
finance.description: Moscow labeled the joint military operation "unprovoked armed aggression," warned of radiological catastrophe, and began evacuating Russians from Iran.

finance.title: Trump asks if Supreme Court can rehear tariff case
finance.description: The president called the 6-3 ruling "highly disappointing" and warned it could force refunds of hundreds of billions to foreign companies.

finance.title: FAA to cut O'Hare flights, citing overscheduling by major airlines
finance.description: United Airlines and American Airlines have dramatically ramped up summer schedules at the Chicago hub, prompting federal intervention.

finance.title: Slovak PM says Ukraine unwilling to restart Druzhba oil flow
finance.description: Slovakia's prime minister spoke with Zelenskyy on Friday but said Kyiv rejected a joint inspection proposal, deepening a dispute that has stalled EU sanctions and aid.

finance.title: Trump launched Iran strikes despite intel doubting his missile threat claims
finance.description: Intelligence sources told Reuters that Trump's claim Iran could "soon" hit the U.S. with missiles was unsupported by assessments putting that capability a decade away.

finance.title: Paramount signs $110B deal to acquire Warner Bros. Discovery
finance.description: The agreement ends a bidding war after Netflix declined to match Paramount Skydance's $31-per-share offer for the media giant.

finance.title: DOJ indicts 30 more over anti-ICE church protest in Minnesota
finance.description: Attorney General Bondi said 25 of the newly charged defendants have been arrested, bringing the total number indicted in the case to 39.

finance.title: Classified report found Noem's shoe policy created airport security risks
finance.description: A DHS inspector general report described risks from the policy as "significant," according to The Wall Street Journal, adding to scrutiny of Noem's leadership.

finance.title: Pentagon laser accidentally downs a Border Patrol drone in Texas
finance.description: The military mistakenly shot down a CBP drone near Fort Hancock, marking the second border laser incident this month and drawing Democratic accusations of incompetence.

finance.title: US birthrate hits record low, driven by teens and young women
finance.description: Nearly half of American women at age 30 are now childless, as the steepest fertility declines fall on the youngest and least affluent.

finance.title: Trump says he's considering Cruz for Supreme Court
finance.description: The president revived the idea at a Texas rally, despite Cruz rejecting it last month, saying "hell no" to any nomination.

finance.title: Satellite images reveal US military buildup at Saudi airbase
finance.description: Aircraft at Prince Sultan Airbase jumped from 27 to 43 over four days in February as the US ramps up its largest Middle East deployment in two decades.

finance.title: ACLU sues Kansas over law invalidating transgender IDs
finance.description: The lawsuit challenges SB 244, which retroactively voided driver's licenses and birth certificates of transgender residents who had legally updated their gender markers.
